HY.Description: Hoehn and Yahr stage of the participant

Levels.2.0: Bilateral involvement without impairment of balance
Levels.2.5: Mild bilateral involvement with recovery on retropulsion (pull) test
Levels.3.0: Mild to moderate bilateral involvement, some postural instability but physically independent
Levels.4.0: Severe disability, still able to walk and to stand unassisted
Levels.5.0: Wheelchair bound or bedridden unless aided
